name: Aerosol Particle Size Distribution at Neumayer Station, Antarctica (2018)
description: Time-series dataset of aerosol particle size distributions measured at Neumayer Station (SPUSO), Antarctica. The data includes differential number concentrations (dN/dlogDp) across a wide range of particle diameters from approximately 93 nm to 4846 nm, recorded at a measurement height of 7 meters. Each record contains start and end timestamps, duration, and fixed spatial coordinates (Latitude: -70.65, Longitude: -8.25, Elevation: 42 m).
